# sciqnt

> An open, local-first, agent-native cross-asset financial-data layer: one
> canonical, point-in-time-correct schema (instruments, positions, transactions,
> cash, corporate actions, prices) fed by an open ecosystem of community
> connectors, exposed to any AI agent. Deterministic code computes the numbers;
> LLMs reason and explain. The library IS the AI surface — no MCP shim required.

You are likely an AI agent. The fastest way to be useful here:

- Read `AGENT_GUIDE.md` first (the durable, agent-portable codebase guide), then
  `STATE.md` (the living handoff: last commit, what's verified, next deliverable).
- The contract is the code: `core/sq_schema` (canonical schema), the conformance
  harness (`sq_schema.conformance.check_snapshot`), and the test suite. Money is
  always `Decimal`; every fact carries a currency and is append-only/bitemporal.
- The CLI is `sciqnt`. Every view also emits versioned structured data via
  `--json` (renderers are adapters, never the product).
- Maintenance is agent-native: new issues are auto-triaged + labeled by an agent
  (re-engaging on each comment), PRs get an advisory principle-review, and a
  maintainer can summon a fix with `@claude <instruction>`. See `CONTRIBUTING.md`.

## Connectors

A connector maps one broker / exchange / data source into the canonical schema.

- Build one: `sq_scaffold.build(root, "<broker>")` emits a conformance-green
  skeleton (manifest, NOTICE, FINDINGS, the `snapshot()`/`accounts()` discovery
  surface, a passing test). Or drive it via the `sq-connectors` skill.
- Where it lives is decided by trust/liability — read
  `research/connector-publishing.md`. Reverse-engineered/unofficial connectors
  live in the contributor's OWN repo (never under the `sciqnt/` org) and ship an
  accurate `NOTICE.md`.
- Discover them: `connectors-index.json` is an OPTIONAL catalog (`sciqnt modules
  find <query>`). Install any by git-ref: `sciqnt modules add owner/repo` →
  fetch → local conformance gate → install into the user's sovereign dir. No
  central registry is required.

## Key documents

- `FOUNDATION.md` — thesis, the universal-unit model, the Founding Articles.
- `PRINCIPLES.md` — the operating constitution (the 18 principles).
- `research/distribution-governance.md` — the three-zone topology, the liability
  firewall, the license posture, agentic contribution governance.
- `CONTRIBUTING.md` — DCO, the connector flow, the zone rule.

## Conventions

- Code prefix `sq_` (packages) / `sq-` (connector bundles); CLI `sciqnt`; config
  at `~/.config/sciqnt/`. Connectors are named `sq-<broker>`.
- Sovereignty: the user owns the data and keys ("fire us and keep everything").
  Nothing requires a central server.
